Siam Evergreen Materials Public Company Limited (fictional, SET-listed) submits this operational cyber incident report pursuant to SET and SEC Thailand disclosure practice.
Incident window: 28–30 May 2026; report date: 2 June 2026; preliminary notice already posted on SET News on 30 May 2026.
Scope: unauthorized access to a non-production vendor portal during a PDPA readiness drill; production ERP, customer, and payroll systems were not accessed.
Affected systems: test HR workflow module and procurement sandbox; only log metadata and form headers were visible to the intruder.
Positive identifier cluster (contained in logs): a temporary line supervisor (DOB 1992-07; Pathum Thani site; contracted via Lotus Bridge Services Co., Ltd.) used handset model Jintaka A5 with IMEI suffix 8891 and VPN account suffix -4421 from IP 192.0.2.14; no legal name appeared.
No copies of national ID cards, passports, or credit card PANs were stored or exposed in the affected environment.
Sample form labels in the portal (e.g., Name:, Citizen ID:, Bank Account:) displayed placeholders such as 9999999999999 and 00-000-0000; these values are invalid and not linked to any person.
This event is not material under SEA/SEC standards and will be summarized in the MD&A for Q2/2026 and in the Form 56-1 One Report (B.E. 2569) as a general cybersecurity risk.
The phrase “account number” appears in template emails generated by the portal, but the test messages contained only masked demo strings (XXXX-XXXX-XXXX) and no transactional data.
Cross-border processing occurred during a scheduled migration to a Singapore cloud region with backup in Tokyo; SCCs/DPA and PDPA-compliant consent terms are in place.
Remediation: vendor credentials were reset, API keys rotated, and an access control rule was added; a routine password change notice was sent to all sandbox users via a role mailbox.
Employment and contractor matters: one site badge for a contractor account was suspended for 24 hours for training; no disciplinary record or health data was involved.
Contact points: Data Protection Office dpo@siamevergreen.co.th and Investor Relations ir@siamevergreen.co.th for further public information; no personal contacts are provided.
